changes.comment: chore: remove SetupContextBag — setup(props) takes only props; lifecycle hooks (onMounted/onCleanup/onEvent/onElement/watchEffect), host bindings (bind/aria), context (inject/injectStrict/provide), and per-instance factories (useEmit/useSlots/getHost) are now free functions imported from @vielzeug/ore. Form helpers (useField/createFormContext) moved to @vielzeug/ore/forms. define()/ComponentDefinition dropped the Emits/SlotNames generics in favor of useEmit<Emits>()/useSlots<SlotNames>().
